description.to:
## Summary
Document balanced associated-dataset curation and score-page dataset visibility.

## Purpose
Ensure operators can discover and correctly use defaults, controls, and expected outputs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Public docs use associated-dataset terminology only.
- Docs cover balancing default behavior and `--no-balance` opt-out.
- Docs cover score-page associated-dataset panel and its data semantics.
- Examples are updated and render correctly in the public web app docs.
